race.description: Farm & Construction Products And Goldacres Qtis Hcp
race.comment: DON'T TOUCH (4) resumes after a break of six months. Looking to emulate her debut win over 1000m at Home Hill to kick off last prep. Expected to go very well. HIGH SECURITY (3) ran a better race last start to finish a close third over 1000m at Yeppoon. Finds a suitable race and can go on to take this out. VIKING TREASURE (7) stuck on well last start to finish second over 1075m at Thangool after showing good early speed. Will enjoy a drop in class so she is a major player. KENNY THE BAKER (6) won his maiden three starts back and is nearing another victory with placings at his last two runs, most recently when second over 1200m at Longreach. Should settle handy in the run. Not to be discounted.
